channel.title: GitHub Haskell Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of Haskell in GitHub

item.title: koalaman/shellcheck
item.description: ShellCheck, a static analysis tool for shell scripts

item.title: ucsd-progsys/liquid-fixpoint
item.description: Horn Clause Constraint Solving for Liquid Types

item.title: github/semantic
item.description: Parsing, analyzing, and comparing source code across many languages

item.title: IntersectMBO/cardano-ledger
item.description: The ledger implementation and specifications of the Cardano blockchain.

item.title: hadolint/hadolint
item.description: Dockerfile linter, validate inline bash, written in Haskell

item.title: IntersectMBO/cardano-node
item.description: The core component that is used to participate in a Cardano decentralised blockchain.

item.title: haskell/cabal
item.description: Official upstream development repository for Cabal and cabal-install

item.title: haskell/haskell-language-server
item.description: Official haskell ide support via language server (LSP). Successor of ghcide & haskell-ide-engine.

item.title: ghc/ghc
item.description: Mirror of the Glasgow Haskell Compiler. Please submit issues and patches to GHC's Gitlab instance (https://gitlab.haskell.org/ghc/ghc). First time contributors are encouraged to get started with the newcomers info (https://gitlab.haskell.org/ghc/ghc/wikis/contributing).
